pair<long long, long long> getFraction(const string& s) {

    // parse into integer_part, decimal_non_repeat, decimal_repeat

    string integer_part, decimal_non_repeat, decimal_repeat;

    size_t dot_pos = s.find('.');

    if (dot_pos == string::npos) {

        integer_part = s;

        decimal_non_repeat = "";

        decimal_repeat = "";

    } else {

        integer_part = s.substr(0, dot_pos);

        string decimal_part = s.substr(dot_pos + 1);

        size_t open_pos = decimal_part.find('(');

        if (open_pos == string::npos) {

            decimal_non_repeat = decimal_part;

            decimal_repeat = "";

        } else {

            decimal_non_repeat = decimal_part.substr(0, open_pos);

            string repeat_part = decimal_part.substr(open_pos + 1);

            size_t close_pos = repeat_part.find(')');

            if (close_pos != string::npos) {

                decimal_repeat = repeat_part.substr(0, close_pos);

Now, code for helper function:

pair<long long, long long> getFraction(const string& s) {

    // parse into integer_part, decimal_non_repeat, decimal_repeat

    string integer_part, decimal_non_repeat, decimal_repeat;

    size_t dot_pos = s.find('.');

    if (dot_pos == string::npos) {

        integer_part = s;

        decimal_non_repeat = "";

        decimal_repeat = "";

    } else {

        integer_part = s.substr(0, dot_pos);

        string decimal_part = s.substr(dot_pos + 1);

        size_t open_pos = decimal_part.find('(');

        if (open_pos == string::npos) {

            decimal_non_repeat = decimal_part;

            decimal_repeat = "";

        } else {

            decimal_non_repeat = decimal_part.substr(0, open_pos);

            string repeat_part = decimal_part.substr(open_pos + 1);

            size_t close_pos = repeat_part.find(')');

            if (close_pos != string::npos) {

                decimal_repeat = repeat_part.substr(0, close_pos);

            } else {

                // invalid, but problem says input is valid.

                decimal_repeat = repeat_part; // assuming that the input is correct.

            }

        }

    }

    // Now compute the decimal part's fraction.

    long long decimal_num = 0;

    long long decimal_den = 1;

    if (!decimal_non_repeat.empty() || !decimal_repeat.empty()) {

        if (decimal_repeat.empty()) {

            int m = decimal_non_repeat.length();

            if (m == 0) {

                decimal_num = 0;

                decimal_den = 1;

            } else {

                decimal_num = stoll(decimal_non_repeat);

                decimal_den = 1;

                for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) decimal_den *= 10;

            }

        } else {

            int m = decimal_non_repeat.length();

            int n = decimal_repeat.length();

            string concatenated_str = decimal_non_repeat + decimal_repeat;

            long long concatenated_num = stoll(concatenated_str);

            long long non_repeating_num = (decimal_non_repeat.empty() ? 0 : stoll(decimal_non_repeat));

            long long numerator = concatenated_num - non_repeating_num;

            long long denominator_part1 = 1;

            for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) denominator_part1 *= 10;

            long long denominator_part2 = 1;

            for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) denominator_part2 *= 10;

            denominator_part2 -= 1;

            decimal_den = denominator_part1 * denominator_part2;

            decimal_num = numerator;

        }

    }

    // Now compute the integer part.

    long long integer_num = stoll(integer_part);

    // total_num = integer_num * decimal_den + decimal_num

    long long total_num = integer_num * decimal_den + decimal_num;

    long long total_den = decimal_den;

    return {total_num, total_den};

}

Wait, but in the code above, decimal_num and decimal_den are the decimal part's fraction. Then, adding integer_num gives integer_num + decimal_num / decimal_den → (integer_num * decimal_den + decimal_num) / decimal_den.

Now, code for the Solution class:

bool isRationalEqual(string s, string t) {

    auto [s_num, s_den] = getFraction(s);

    auto [t_num, t_den] = getFraction(t);

    return (s_num * t_den) == (t_num * s_den);

}
